get.description: Initiates the OIDC authorization flow by redirecting the user to the provider's login page.
Handles the callback from the OIDC provider, exchanges the authorization code for tokens, and redirects to the frontend.

post.description: Creates a new account with email and password and returns an authentication token.
Authenticates with email and password and returns an authentication token.
Verifies a user's email address using the token from the verification email.
Resends the email verification link to the authenticated user.

get.description:
Return distinct metric names (with a representative unit) for this account.

Used by the dashboard to discover which product sections to render.
Plain JSON response (not JSON:API) — this is metadata, not a metric resource.
Return all plan tier definitions as JSON:API resources.
Return all products with their plans and limits as JSON:API resources.
Return per-product subscription state for the authenticated account.

post.description: Create a new paid subscription for a product.
Create a Stripe SetupIntent for saving a payment method.

patch.description: Change the plan for an existing paid subscription (upgrade or downgrade).

delete.description: Cancel a subscription at end of the current billing period.

get.description: Return the default payment method for the account's Stripe Customer.
